Notice Of Application & Hrg For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment; Request For Delayed Public Disclosure
Off Calendar Oct-13-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Greg Day, Esq., 760-436-2827 for plaintiff and moving party CATHIE BROWN.

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.
PLAINTIFF CATHIE BROWN'S Notice Of Application & Hrg For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment; Request For Delayed Public Disclosure TRO IS granted. WRIT OF ATTACHMENT WILL BE ISSUED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558. (301/JLW/DM)
